name: Boyo Transportation SVC Inc
carrier_operation: Interstate; Auth. For Hire; Priv. Pass. (Non-business); Passenger
registry_source: Pennsylvania Department of State - Bureau of Corporations
notes: SAFER record matches: legal name Boyo Transportation Services Inc, principal place Palmyra PA (HQ); Ephrata is a branch office (1924 W Main St per Yelp; input address 740 E Main St also reported). Power units (12) and drivers (8) per MCS-150 dated 08/28/2024 — likely reflects only interstate-authorized passenger fleet; intrastate school-bus fleet is significantly larger across PA branches (Harrisburg, Palmyra, Ephrata, Shippensburg, Middletown, Hanover) per company about page. Founded 1993 by Donald Boyanowski Sr.

name: Lakeside School Buses
registry_source: Wisconsin DFI (search returned no record via WebFetch; entity exists per SAFER and BBB; manual verification needed at apps.dfi.wi.gov/apps/corpsearch/Advanced.aspx)
notes: SAFER legal name 'LAKESIDE BUSES OF WISCONSIN INC' — clear match to input 'Lakeside School Buses' (DBA-style variant) at exact address 7111 W Mill Rd, Milwaukee. Subsidiary of Student Transportation of America (acquired Nov 15, 2011 per School Bus Fleet/PitchBook). PitchBook lists company founded 2010 — likely date of corporate formation; Wisconsin DFI online search via automated fetch did not return results despite entity clearly existing (DFI search UI requires browser-rendered JS). Address in HQ field (Milwaukee, WI) confirmed.

name: PA Coach Lines
carrier_operation: Interstate; Authorized For-Hire; Exempt For-Hire; Wrecker Service
inc_date: 1989 (year only; specific date not located in DOS records via web)
entity_status: Active (PA Domestic Business Corporation per third-party sources)
registry_source: PA Department of State - Bureau of Corporations (manual verification at file.dos.pa.gov recommended); company history per BBB/Bloomberg/PrivCo cite founding 1989
notes: SAFER legal name 'PENNSYLVANIA COACH LINES INC' matches; SAFER address 415 Rebecca St, McKeesport differs from input '637 Eden Park Blvd, McKeesport' — likely a separate yard/garage of the same operator. Power units/drivers on SAFER snapshot (MCS-150 03/03/2026) reported as only 2/2, which is inconsistent with industry profiles citing ~125 employees and $5.3M revenue; this may reflect MCS-150 reporting limited to interstate-authorized vehicles only, with the much larger intrastate school-bus fleet not reflected on SAFER. Company sued McKeesport Area School District 2021. PA DOS file number not located via WebFetch (CAPTCHA on opencorporates; PA file.dos.pa.gov returned 403).

name: Edward Schaffer & Son
registry_source: NY Department of State Division of Corporations (manual verification required; entity not found via web search)
notes: No confident match found. FMCSA SAFER keyword search returned no records for 'EDWARD SCHAFFER', 'SCHAFFER', or 'SHAFFER' in NY. Not listed in NYSDOT OSSS Bus Operator Profiles (binary PDF parsing limited but no web hits). Not found in NYSBCA member list. Possibly a defunct/historical NYC-area school bus contractor, a misspelling of a similar name (e.g., 'Robert T. Shafer & Sons' in NY exists but is a different operator under Shafer Bus), or a very small district contractor without USDOT registration. Input record provided no hq or address, complicating disambiguation. Recommend manual NY DOS Division of Corporations search at apps.dos.ny.gov/publicInquiry/ with name variants 'Edward Schaffer', 'Edward Schaffer & Son', 'Edward Schaffer & Sons', 'Edward Shaffer & Son'.

name: Staten Island Bus Inc
fmcsa_status: ACTIVE (Carrier Registration Information Outdated; NOT AUTHORIZED for interstate for-hire — intrastate operations not restricted)
registry_source: NY Department of State Division of Corporations (manual verification required; opencorporates and bizapedia direct fetches blocked by CAPTCHA/410)
notes: SAFER legal name 'STATEN ISLAND BUS INC' matches input. SAFER address (1386 Ralph Ave, Brooklyn, NY 11236) differs from input address (52 Bayview Ave, Staten Island, NY 10309) — 1386 Ralph Ave is shared with Consolidated Bus Transit, suggesting common ownership/management; the Bayview Ave address is likely a Staten Island operating yard. MCS-150 last updated 10/25/2013, hence SAFER flag 'Carrier Registration Information Outdated'; power units (142) and drivers (133) reflect that 2013 snapshot. NY DOS file date and DOS ID not retrievable via web (NY DOS public inquiry not directly fetchable via WebFetch; opencorporates and bizapedia both blocked).
